title: Luxon module not found in code node
symptom: When executing a code node that requires the Luxon module, n8n throws 'Cannot find module 'luxon''. This prevents the workflow from processing dates correctly.
applies_when: Using a code node that requires Luxon
not_this_if: Using n8n cloud or a managed service
root_cause: The error occurs because the Luxon module is not installed in the environment where n8n is running. Custom modules need to be installed manually in self-hosted instances to be accessible in code nodes.
fix_steps: Open your terminal and navigate to your n8n installation directory.
Run the command 'npm install luxon' to install the Luxon module.
If using Docker, create a Dockerfile that includes 'RUN npm install -g luxon' and rebuild your Docker image.
Restart your n8n instance to ensure the changes take effect.
agent_instruction: Install the Luxon module in your n8n environment using npm.
